ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Courgette or zucchini, flesh and skin, raw

ingredients_text: Legumi 40% (ceci reidratati 22,5%, piselli 22,5%, fagioli borlotti reidratati 17,5%, fagiolini 17,5%, fagioli cannellini reidratati 12,5%, lenticchie reidratate 7,5%), patate 15,5%, zucca 14,5%, carote 12,5%, zucchine 10%, broccoli 3,8%, porro 3,8%
